title: ptilagrostis contracta
intro: Ptilagrostis contracta, also known as Needle and Thread Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ptilagrostis contracta include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and aid in the healing of skin irritations. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
